Typeform: People-Friendly Forms and Surveys Skip to main content Don't just collect leads—close them. Learn more about Typeform for Growth. AI ENGAGEMENT PLATFORM Build forms at the drop of a prompt Put a seasoned form expert to work with Typeform AI. It structures and designs at your command. Just type to build and edit. Get started—it's free Trusted by 95% of the Fortune 500 The form is only the beginning DATA COLLECTION Get 3.5x more data with a form expert Backed by over a decade of experience, Typeform AI helps you build expertly-designed, best-practice forms proven to get more responses. Get started—it's free NEW: CONTACTS & AUTOMATIONS Trigger action that brings in customers Collect and then act on customer contact data. As new data arrives it triggers automatic segmentation and follow-up emails, so you can convert faster than ever. See add-on Integrations Connect with hundreds of your business-critical tools See all integrations Why Typeform? After switching to Typeform, our customers agree: 96% have a better brand experience 95% gather more data, more easily 87% reveal deeper data insights Get started—it's free

[PAGE: /about]
About us Skip to main content Don't just collect leads—close them. Learn more about Typeform for Growth. About Typeform Typeform is a refreshingly different form builder. We help over 150,000 businesses collect the data they need with forms, surveys, and quizzes that people enjoy. Our mission At Typeform, we give forms a better look and feel—so our customers can get more out of them. Historically, forms haven't been great, but businesses need them and people can’t avoid them. ‍ That's why we designed a form that allows brands to give as much to people as they’re trying to get. The bottom line is: you should give people something before you can ask them for anything. Our leadership team Jay Choi Chief Executive Officer Aleks Bass Chief Product & Technology Officer Benoit Aguila Chief Financial Officer Bryce Winkelman Chief Revenue Officer Emmaka Porchea-Veneszee Chief of Staff Os Fuentes Head of People & Culture Join the team Founded in 2012, Typeform is now a remote-first company with an international team of over 250 employees. We offer competitive compensation, benefits, and career opportunites to support your professional growth. Browse open roles Start getting to know your customers Our Free Plan lets you: Create unlimited forms Access 3,000+ templates Start getting responses Sign up Compare plans

Not available Not available Not available Not available 20,000 Bespoke 1,500 Not available Be on-brand Start with a template Save time and effort with templates you can customize to fit what your brand needs. Add your brand logo Display your logo on every screen of your form. Customize your form’s metadata Customize your form link previews on social media and messaging apps. Apply premium themes Choose a theme from our designer-curated gallery and customize your form to match your brand’s personality. Remove Typeform branding from your forms Remove the Typeform footer from your forms. Create a brand kit Create a library of logos, images, and media to use consistently across your organization. Create custom links for different forms Give a custom form ID to your form’s URL. Create a custom subdomain for your account Choose a unique subdomain to use across all your forms. Add custom fonts Upload your own fonts so every form you create aligns with your brand identity. Connect a custom domain to your account Set up a custom domain to use across all your forms. Custom Email Domain - Gmail Customize your forms Create a knowledge quiz Use logic to calculate quiz scores and create outcome quizzes. Multiple endings per form Show different endings to different respondents based on your form logic. Trigger order summaries, thank you notes, or even feedback requests. Add logic to your forms Add logic to your forms to connect, skip, and rearrange questions as needed. Recall information Pull data from previous questions and bring back information to show respondents. Use recall information with variables, hidden fields, scores, and prices. Add scores and calculations to your forms Solve scores, prices, quiz results with questions designed to qualify leads, order forms, and more. Create an outcome quiz Use logic to calculate quiz scores and create outcome quizzes. Add custom variables Create custom numeric or text values that your form can keep track of. Personalize with hidden fields Use data you already have, track information about your respondents, and make your forms more personal. Add files to Typeform AI Add PDFs, CSVs, or text files to Typeform AI to get responses that are tailored to your specific context. Create forms in multiple languages Enable form translation to allow respondents to view and respond to any form in their own language. Exclusive to growth + talent plans Add video questions Record, edit, and embed personalized videos into your forms. Prevent spam submissions with reCAPTCHA Boost your form’s security and prevent bot attacks to make sure the data you collect is authentic and reliable. Exclusive to growth + talent plans Prevent duplicate responses Ensure the accuracy of your data by preventing multiple responses from the same respondent. Share and embed Embed forms Embed your form on your website, in an email, and more. Set up custom launch options for embedded forms Launch your embedded form after a delay, scroll, page exit and engage your audience at the right time. Set forms to close on submit Program your form to close after a response is submitted. Connect your apps See all integrations +500 integrations with Zapier Easily push data you collect on Typeform to over 500 services through Zapier. Airtable Send form responses to Airtable, where you can organize your data and collaborate easily. Google Sheets Send your data straight to Google Sheets. Automatically syncs as results come in. Hubspot Send contact, company, or deal info to HubSpot to quickly follow up on new leads or update existing details to your free HubSpot account. Pipedrive Turn new contacts into deals and add them to any stage of your sales pipeline in Pipedrive. Mailchimp Send new contacts to your Mailchimp audiences, and tag them so they're easy to organize. Slack Notify a channel or individual in Slack with real-time form responses. Calendly Enable respondents to schedule appointments directly on your calendar through Calendly. Salesforce Send form responses to Salesforce as contacts, leads, and more. Google Analytics Track visitor behavior and demographics by adding your Google Analytics tracking code to any of your forms. Google Tag Manager Add your own code snippets to forms for conversion tracking, site analytics, retargeting, and more. Meta Pixel See how many people view, open, and submit your form from Meta sources. Automate your workflows Number of follow-ups per form Send one or more follow-up messages when you receive a response to your form. Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited Unlimited Set up conditions for follow-ups Segment respondents and automate personalized follow-up actions based on logic. Set up email notifications Send custom emails to whoever needs to be aware when someone responds to your form. Set up automated lead scoring Implement automated lead scoring to prioritize leads based on the data you collect and 3rd-party enrichment data, ensuring resources are focused on the highest-quality leads. Set up automated lead routing Make your lead generation more efficient with automated lead routing. Send follow-up emails to respondents Follow up with programmed emails after someone completes your form. Redirect respondents to a webpage Redirect your audience to a custom URL from an ending screen or upon completion of a form. Exclusive to growth + talent plans Automated data enrichment (B2B & B2C) Automatically enrich response data from directly within Typeform to gain deeper insights into your audience. Generate insights and optimize performance Download responses Download responses in XLSX or CSV format. View form performance metrics Check your form's performance according to views, starts, submissions, completion rate, and time to complete. Visualize performance over time Learn how your form performs over time. Question Drop-off Analysis Drive higher completion rates and optimize your form by identifying areas for improvement Receive performance optimization tips Leverage machine learning recommendations and best practices to improve completion rates. Smart Insights Access personalized data analysis, reports, and insights powered by AI. Capture more Receive file uploads Let your audience attach files to their responses. 1 GB 2 GB 4 GB 4 GB 4 GB 4 GB 4 GB 4 GB Accept payments Use payment questions to accept payment via Stripe. Collect partial responses Collect answers to the most important questions in your form, even if respondents don't complete your form. To use this feature with forms that include logic or scoring, select one of the Growth plans Number of partial submit points Collect answers to the most important questions in your form, even if respondents don't complete your form. To use this feature with forms that include logic or scoring, select one of the Growth plans 1 1 3 3 3 3 3 3 Clarify with AI Encourage detailed responses with AI-generated clarification questions Exclusive to growth + talent plans Collect video answers Allow respondents to record or upload video answers. Security and compliance Ensure GDPR Compliance GDPR compliance for privacy and information use is built right into Typeform. Set up Single Sign-On (SSO) Set up SSO authentication for your account. Your single sign-on (SSO) identity provider can be Okta, OneLogin, Azure, PingFederate or other providers that support SAML, OAuth or OpenID. Set up two-factor authentication (2FA) Set up an extra layer of security with two-factor authentication. Ensure HIPAA Compliance Keep respondent data secure and HIPAA compliant with Typeform. Choose your preferred data center (US or EU) Choose the physical location of your cloud server to comply with any relevant policies and regulations. Account management See user login activity View users’ last login date to make informed seat tracking and licensing decisions. Add users to Organizations and Workspaces Give multiple users access to your Organization and Workspaces. Assign user roles and permissions Invite and manage multiple users’ access to the organization and its workspaces. Add users on Organization viewer seats Invite an unlimited number of people to your organization to view or share results. Users on Organization viewer seats are not able to create or edit forms. Download team activity Download user activity reports to track what’s happening within your organization. Developer tools Access Typeform’s APIs Create, update, delete, and customize forms, themes, and images on the fly, without using the Typeform builder. Add Block references Add unique identifiers to questions and endings to help you identify them in your code. Add webhooks Send responses from your forms to any URL or compatible web application as soon as they’re submitted. Support Standard support Support via email. Live chat support Contact a support representative using live chat support. Priority support Your request will be prioritized if you contact our Support team through email. VIP onboarding and training Receive individualized team onboarding and training, as well as a dedicated customer outcomes manager committed to your success. Customer Outcomes Manager Have a dedicated customer outcomes manager committed to your success. Monthly Yearly (Save 30%) Basic 29 USD 25 USD per month Get Basic Plus 59 USD 50 USD per month Get Plus Business 99 USD 83 USD per month Get Business Enterprise Custom per month Get Enterprise Monthly Yearly (Save 30%) Growth Pro 349 USD 291 USD per month Get Growth Pro Growth Custom Custom annually Get Growth Custom Monthly Yearly (Save 30%) Talent 149 USD 125 USD per month Get Talent Enterprise Custom per month Get Enterprise Trusted by 95% of the Fortune 500 “We just hosted a virtual event for 60,000 people using Typeform for the bookings.” Becca Ravenna, Senior Director, Corporate Sales and Partnerships at Barry’s Frequently asked questions If you have any additional questions, visit our help center . What are the benefits of a paid vs free plan? Paid plans unlock powerful features, more responses, and tons of customization options, making it easier and faster for you to collect valuable data and take action on it. What’s included in the free plan? The free plan is a great way to explore Typeform and get a feel for how Typeform can help grow your business. It includes basic features with a limited number of responses per month. Once you’ve got a feel for the platform, upgrading to more advanced features is just a few clicks! Can I upgrade, downgrade or switch between plans? Yes, you can upgrade, downgrade or switch between plans at any time. We’ve noticed our customers often upgrade as their businesses grow and the complexity of their use cases requires additional features. Typeform scales as you grow. Can I pause a paid subscription? While you currently cannot pause a prepaid subscription, if for some reason you need to lower your usage we recommend just downgrading your plan vs cancelling. We understand some seasons are busier than others. Do you offer discounts if I pay yearly instead of monthly? Yes, for annual plans you will receive a discount. Depending on the plan you select, you could be saving up to 16% with an annual plan. Is there a limit to the number of responses I can collect? Each plan includes a set number of responses per month, with different limits depending on the plan selected. Need more? No problem. You can easily upgrade to collect even more responses. ‍ If you’re looking to collect over 50,000 responses/month, just reach out to our sales team —we’ll work with you to create a custom plan that’s tailored to your specific business needs. What happens if I cancel my subscription? The changes will take effect at the end of the prepaid period. Your forms and previously collected responses will not be deleted after the paid plan expires. However, depending on your plan change, your forms may be closed to new responses and seat count reduced. How secure is Typeform? The security and integrity of your data are critically important for us, and we’ve built our services around this idea. Once your information enters Typeform’s systems (located in AWS), it’s secured with multiple levels of encryption and access controls, for example: ‍ Your data in-transit is encrypted using secure TLS cryptographic protocols (TLS 1.2). Your data at rest is encrypted using Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) with a 256-bit key. Redundant backups of critical data are also in place to ensure business continuity in case of disaster. ‍ For more detail on the security measures, please visit Security at Typeform . What can I do with my data once it's collected? Your data is all yours to explore! Dive into your responses in our Results area, create stunning reports, and easily share them with colleagues or your team. ‍ Plus, Typeform seamlessly integrates with hundreds of apps, opening up endless possibilities to supercharge your workflow. ‍ For the tech-savvy, you can take it a step further—set up webhooks and tap into our powerful APIs to craft custom solutions that perfectly fit your business. Check out our Developer Portal to get started! ‍ I have additional questions, who do I contact? We’ve here to help you. Drop us a request and we’ll reach out to you as soon as possible. The form is just the beginning Start creating

Platform Overview Don't just collect leads—close them. Learn more about Typeform for Growth. platform overview Gain up to 3.5x more data from your forms Typeform helps you collect more data with forms, surveys, and quizzes designed to be appealing, and put that data to good use so you know your next move faster. Try Typeform for free Trusted by 95% of the Fortune 500 why typeform? Designed to be appealing Eye-catching designs Customize everything from colors and logos all the way down to custom domains, so your forms are on-brand (and looking good). Learn more Engaging videos People engage more with video than just text. Cue video forms: you record questions and people record their responses, resulting in deeper insights. Learn more Feels intuitive Enriching data means you ask fewer questions, which helps keep people focused. You can even tailor follow-up questions based on their responses. Learn more FEATURES How it works Design engaging forms Connect your tools Reach your audience Automate your workflows Analyze your data Share your insights Design engaging forms Get more responses with conversational, beautifully-designed forms that are easy to create, too. Start with a professional template or generate questions fast with AI. Find out more Connect your tools Send responses straight to marketing tools like Hubspot, take payments with Stripe, and let people book into your calendar directly with Calendly. You can auto-sync responses to tools like Google Sheet and Notion, too. Find out more Reach your audience Reach more potential form takers. Paste a link to post your on form social, or copy ready-made code to embed in emails and landing pages. You can use QR codes, too. Find out more Automate your workflows Qualify new leads as they fill out your form. Then route them to the right tools and teams, keep everyone updated with instant notifications, and trigger follow-up emails. Find out more Analyze your data Work with AI to surface trends, outliers, and recommendations from the data you collect, so you can act faster. It also helps you understand how people feel, along with key themes from open-text responses. Find out more Share your insights Turn data into action. Use video responses as web testimonials, share auto-generated (and impressive-looking) charts with stakeholders, and use data to build your next Big Report. Find out more Integrations Fits right into your workflow View all 300+ integrations Typeform AI By your side to help with: CREATOR AI Building forms Describe the form you need, then watch Creator AI build and brand it. You can edit anything, too. INTERACTION AI Adapting questions No two form takers are the same. Interaction AI asks relevant follow-up questions, so they share more. INSIGHTS AI Analyzing data Understand what the data is telling you faster by chatting with Insights AI about it. Explore Typeform AI USE CASES Built for all your team goals Manage data collection across your entire customer lifecycle. Lead generation Marketers, sales teams, and founders can use interactive forms and quizzes to attract, qualify, and segment leads. This helps you make a more personal first impression so you can ultimately boost conversion rates. Start with a template Audience engagement Marketing, human resources, and customer experience teams can build stronger connections with thoughtful check-ins, engagement surveys, or interactive touchpoints that spark conversation and loyalty. Start with a template Video testimonials Marketing and customer teams can capture compelling customer stories and social proof with forms that prompt thoughtful testimonials and in-depth feedback, ready to be turned into content. Start with a template Product recommendation E-commerce and SaaS businesses can guide shoppers or users to the right solution with quizzes and flows that offer personalized suggestions based on needs and preferences. Start with a template Research and feedback Customer experience and product teams can easily gather feedback to keep improving. Researchers, product teams, and analysts can use Typeform to run surveys that uncover market trends, validate new ideas, and gather input that guides strategy. Start with a template Recruitment and hiring Recruitment and hiring teams at startups, talent agencies, and HR services can streamline their processes and build better candidate experiences with smart pre-screening questionnaires, responsive job application forms, and automated interview feedback. Start with a template Onboarding and education Support, HR, and success teams can streamline onboarding by collecting key information, guiding users through first steps, and automating welcome sequences that make every onboarding feel seamless and personal. Start with a template Event management Event teams can easily gather feedback post-event to identify what’s working and where to improve for future events. Start with a template Success stories with Typeform customer story How WWF Cities scaled feedback collection “It changed the way in which we were getting the data to the cities and how we were helping them see the patterns and data.” Read WWF's story customer story How SmartBug Media increased sales leads by 40% “We hypothesized Typeform would increase our sales lead volume but we were pleasantly surprised to see a 40% quarter-on-quarter or year-on-year lift.” Read SmartBug Media’s story Frequently asked questions What is Typeform and how is it different from a typical online form platform? Typeform is a platform that combines an interactive form builder, CRM features, integrations and automations, and AI agents to help you collect up to 3.5x more data from forms, surveys and quizzes than traditional tools. Unlike basic form builders, it focuses on visually appealing, conversational experiences with tools to create and-to-end workflows for lead generation, research, onboarding flows and more. Which tools are included in the Typeform platform (forms, surveys, quizzes, etc.)? Within the Typeform platform you can build forms, surveys, quizzes, tests, polls, application forms, landing pages, NPS surveys, registration forms, and short forms—each powered by the same no‑code builder and 3,000+ templates. Contacts & Automations, industry leading data enrichment and AI-powered analytics and insights let you run everything from lead gen and onboarding to research and feedback in one place. How does Typeform’s no‑code form builder work for non‑technical teams? You start from a professional template or a blank canvas, then customize questions, layouts, colors, fonts, and logos using a drag‑and‑drop editor—no coding required. You can also use AI to generate questions, apply logic to personalize flows, and publish via link, embed, or QR code directly from the platform. Typeform guides you through integrating with your other tools, like Slack or Hubspot, with no technical knowledge required. You can easily set up automations for your end to end workflows, and get expert AI-powered analysis of your results and data. How does Typeform connect to my existing tools and workflows? Typeform integrates with 300+ apps, including HubSpot, Salesforce, Mailchimp, Slack, Google Sheets, Stripe, Calendly, Notion, and more. You can send responses into your CRM, trigger workflows in other tools, take payments, or schedule meetings directly from form submissions. What kinds of automation and workflows can I build with the Typeform platform? Using Typeform AI, Workflow Builder and Contacts & Automations, you can qualify and route leads, notify teams, trigger follow‑up emails or Slack alerts, create tasks, and launch onboarding or feedback sequences as soon as someone completes a form. These automations help you act on form data in real time instead of manually exporting spreadsheets. How does Typeform help me analyze and share data from my forms? The platform includes Analytics and reporting within an Insights Hub that surfaces response trends, outliers, sentiment, and key themes using AI. You can view visual charts in real time, share auto‑generated reports with stakeholders, and even reuse video responses as testimonials or content on your site. Who is the Typeform platform designed for? Typeform is built for marketing, product and UX, growth, HR and talent, customer success, operations, research, founders, and any team that needs to collect and act on data online. Common use cases include lead generation, audience engagement, research and feedback, recruitment and hiring, onboarding, education, and event management. How does pricing work for the Typeform platform, and what does the free plan include? The free plan lets you create unlimited forms and access 3,000+ templates, with up to 10 responses per month. Basic, Plus, Business, , Growth Pro, Talent, and Enterprise plans unlock higher response limits, advanced logic, deeper analytics, custom branding, and more robust integrations and security controls. Try Typeform for free Create unlimited forms, access 3,000+ templates, and start getting responses. Sign up Compare plans
